name: Grok-1
archDisplay: Mixture-of-Experts Transformer (8 experts, 2 active per token, 64 layers, RoPE)
note: xAI's first LLM; raw pretrained MoE base checkpoint (Oct 2023 data cutoff), open-sourced under Apache 2.0 on Mar 17 2024.
tpsNote: Needs well over 100GB even at aggressive quantization — nowhere near a single RTX 4090.
verificationNotes: Confirmed real: 314B MoE, 8 experts/2 active, 86B active params confirmed directly from the official RELEASE file text (quoted on X/HN), Apache 2.0 license confirmed via GitHub and x.ai/news/grok-os, 8K context confirmed. CORRECTED releaseDate from 2023-11-04 to 2024-03-17 — 2023-11-04/05 was merely the limited-access debut of the Grok chatbot product (the CNBC source cited for that date is about the product preview, not model weights); the actual open-weights release under Apache 2.0 (matching this record's own openness/license fields and its note text 'open-sourced under Apache 2.0 on Mar 17 2024') happened March 17, 2024 per GitHub, x.ai/news/grok-os, and VentureBeat. Updated releaseDate/ctxK specSources citation accordingly.
